name: copilot-evaluation-tools
description: Tools for generating and scoring Microsoft 365 Copilot evaluation sets

scripts.restore:tools: npm install --prefix eval-gen && npm install --prefix eval-score/node
scripts.build: npm run build --prefix eval-gen && npm run build --prefix eval-score/node
scripts.lint: npm run lint --prefix eval-gen && npm run lint --prefix eval-score/node
